Synthetic value defined by the task description. The agent must create this new zone. setup_task.sh cleans up any pre-existing zone with this name.

Synthetic value defined by the task description. Used consistently for all PIN assignments (new users, transfer user, IT members). setup_task.sh removes all PINs from affected users before each run.

Consistent with task description (~/Documents/rd_onboarding.txt where ~ = /home/ga per env.json user account 'ga'). setup_task.sh line 111 deletes this file and line 112 ensures the directory exists. export_result.sh line 130 checks this exact path. Verified during live testing that /home/ga/Documents/ directory exists (evidence 10_stale_data_cleanup.log).

privileged_info_summary: This task requires provisioning a complete R&D department in 2N Access Commander. All data is synthetic, created by seed_ac_data.py and the task itself. The agent must create: (1) Time profile 'Flex Hours' with Mon-Fri 07:00-21:00 and Sat 09:00-17:00; (2) Group 'R&D Engineering'; (3) Zone 'R&D Lab' with auth mode 'Card and PIN' and description 'Engineering workspace'; (4) Access rule 'R&D Access' linking R&D Engineering group to R&D Lab zone with Flex Hours profile; (5) Access rule 'IT Lab Support' linking IT Department group to R&D Lab zone with Extended Hours profile. The agent must create two new users: Amelia Chen (email: a.chen@buildingtech.com, phone: +1-312-555-0301, company: BuildingTech Solutions, RFID card: 0006700001, PIN: 223344, group: R&D Engineering) and Marcus Rivera (email: m.rivera@buildingtech.com, phone: +1-312-555-0302, company: BuildingTech Solutions, RFID card: 0006700002, PIN: 223344, group: R&D Engineering). The agent must transfer existing employee Darnell Robinson: update his email from d.robinson@buildingtech.com to d.robinson@rd.buildingtech.com, add him to R&D Engineering group, assign PIN 223344, and preserve his original RFID card 0004521896. The agent must also assign PIN 223344 to IT Department members Kwame Asante (original card 0004521885) and Mei-Ling Zhang (original card 0004521886), preserving their existing RFID cards. Finally, a report must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/rd_onboarding.txt documenting all infrastructure, users, and credential changes. Pre-existing seed groups 'IT Department' and 'Employees' and time profile 'Extended Hours' are confirmed to exist via seed_ac_data.py.
